title: Giant Cactus
description: This simple mod adds a giant cactus to the desert biome.
body:
### Giant Cactus

**This simple mod adds a giant cactus to the desert biome.**
![cactus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72a82d37a3551708683b03265347304368c90917.jpeg)

- The terrain around the cactus is designed to blend naturally with the desert biome.
- Perfect spot to build, with enough space to create a base inside or even a cactus XP farm.
  
This mod is also part of the combined ''Giant Natural Additions'' mod.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
